questions.question: Who carries offerings to the Devas?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:CARRIES]->()-->(:Entity {name:'Devas'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who gives energy?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:GIVES]->(:Entity {name:'energy'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Which entity mentions hymns?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Entity {name:'hymn'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who controls breath?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:CONTROLS]->(:Entity {name:'breath'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who wields the thunderbolt?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:WIELDS]->(:Entity {name:'Thunderbolt'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who is described as infinite?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:IS]->(:Entity {name:'Infinite'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who creates the universe?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:CREATES]->(:Entity {name:'Universe'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Which text describes dreams?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:DESCRIBES]->(:Entity {name:'Dreams'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who teaches chants?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:TEACHES]->(:Entity {name:'chants'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Which scripture contains mantras?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Entity {name:'mantras'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who provides light?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:PROVIDES]->(:Entity {name:'Light'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who guards cosmic law?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:GUARDS]->(:Entity {name:'Cosmic law'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who represents cosmic vibration?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS]->(:Entity {name:'Cosmic vibration'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who sustains life?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:SUSTAINS]->(:Entity {name:'Life'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;

questions.question: Who removes ignorance?
questions.cypher: MATCH p=(s:Entity)-[:REMOVES]->(:Entity {name:'Ignorance'}) RETURN s.name AS Answer, p;
